properties.name: Glimmering Fairy
properties.description: A tiny sprite darts between sunbeams, her translucent wings casting iridescent fractals against the bark of the ancient oaks. She leaves a faint trail of glowing dust as she hums a melodic tune.

properties.name: Wobbling Sprite
properties.description: A diminutive creature with a bulbous nose hops from foot to foot, wearing a floppy hat that nearly covers his eyes. He hums a jaunty, buzzing tune and occasionally trips over his own mismatched boots.

properties.name: The Pale Thing
properties.description: A wretched, spindly creature crouches atop the stone bench, its skin the color of a drowned corpse. It gnaws rhythmically on a piece of unidentifiable gristle, watching you with wide, lidless eyes.

properties.name: Golden Chalice
properties.description: Crafted from heavy, beaten gold, this ornate goblet is encrusted with a ring of uncut sapphires. It glints brightly against the dull gray stones of the hillside.

properties.name: Jagged Crevice
properties.description: Hidden behind a cluster of loose boulders, a narrow, dark fissure leads deep into the heart of the hill.
properties.destinationIntent: A cold, damp subterranean cavern with limestone walls. The air should feel heavy and smell of ancient dust. Perhaps some faint, bioluminescent moss or a forgotten altar could add to the mystery.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: Cold, damp air clings to your skin in this vast subterranean chamber. Pale limestone walls weep with moisture, and the heavy atmosphere carries the scent of ancient dust and decay. Patches of faint, bluish bioluminescence flicker along the jagged ceiling.

properties.name: Exit up
properties.description: Leads back to Rocky Hillside.

properties.name: Narrow Tunnel
properties.description: A low, cramped passage winds deeper into the earth.
properties.destinationIntent: A series of flooded tunnels or a subterranean lake.

properties.name: Forgotten Altar
properties.description: A slab of grey stone stands in the center of the room, carved with symbols that have been smoothed away by centuries of dripping water.

properties.name: Bioluminescent Moss
properties.description: Clumps of soft, azure moss cling to the wet limestone, emitting a ghostly, pulsating light.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: Cold, damp air clings to your skin in this vast subterranean space. The limestone walls are slick with moisture, and the scent of ancient, undisturbed dust fills your lungs. High above, the jagged crevice through which you descended is a mere sliver of grey light.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: The air is heavy with the scent of ancient dust and stagnant moisture. Pale limestone walls stretch upward into the gloom, weeping beads of cold water that drip rhythmically into dark pools. A faint, greenish glow emanates from patches of moss clinging to the damp rock.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: The air is heavy with the scent of ancient dust and damp earth. Smooth, pale limestone walls rise into the shadows, slick with a thin film of moisture. Faint patches of pale green moss cling to the rock, casting a ghostly, rhythmic glow across the uneven floor.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: The air here is thick with the scent of ancient dust and stagnant moisture. Pale limestone walls glisten with a slick, cold sweat, curving upward into a jagged ceiling where shadows cling like heavy velvet. A faint, greenish glow emanates from patches of moss clinging to the rock face.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: Cold, damp air clings to your skin in this vast subterranean space. The limestone walls are slick with moisture, and the scent of ancient, undisturbed dust fills your lungs. High above, a jagged fissure allows a sliver of grey light to reach the floor.

properties.name: Exit up
properties.description: Leads back to Rocky Hillside.

properties.name: Narrow Tunnel
properties.description: A low, cramped tunnel winds deeper into the earth.
properties.destinationIntent: A series of tight crawlspaces leading to a hidden grotto.

properties.name: Forgotten Altar
properties.description: A flat slab of stone sits in the center of the cavern, its surface carved with faded, unidentifiable runes.

properties.name: Bioluminescent Moss
properties.description: Patches of pale green moss cling to the damp walls, casting a weak, ghostly light.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: The air is heavy with the scent of ancient dust and stagnant moisture. Damp limestone walls glisten under the faint, ethereal glow of pale moss clinging to the rock face. A silence so profound it feels physical hangs over the jagged floor.

properties.name: Exit up
properties.description: Leads back to Rocky Hillside.

properties.name: Narrow Tunnel
properties.description: A low, cramped tunnel leads deeper into the earth, where the walls press tight together.
properties.destinationIntent: A narrow, twisting crawlspace leading to a hidden grotto with a subterranean pool.

properties.name: Weathered Altar
properties.description: A block of grey stone carved with fading runes. Its surface is slick with condensation and black mold.

properties.name: Bioluminescent Moss
properties.description: The moss emits a ghostly, flickering light, barely illuminating the surrounding rock.

properties.name: Limestone Cavern
properties.description: The air here is thick with the scent of ancient dust and stagnant water. Jagged limestone formations reach down from the ceiling like frozen teeth, glistening with a thin sheen of moisture. A faint, greenish glow emanates from patches of moss clinging to the damp walls.

properties.name: Exit up
properties.description: Leads back to Rocky Hillside.

properties.name: Narrow Tunnel
properties.description: A low, cramped passage leads deeper into the earth, where the air feels even colder.
properties.destinationIntent: A narrow, twisting natural tunnel that requires crawling.

properties.name: weathered altar
properties.description: A block of grey stone sits silently in the center of the cave, its surface smoothed by centuries of dripping water. Faint, unreadable runes are etched into its sides.

properties.name: bioluminescent moss
properties.description: Soft patches of emerald moss cling to the limestone, pulsing with a rhythmic, ghostly light.

properties.name: Chalk Pentagram
properties.description: Drawn in thick, crimson chalk upon the cavern floor, the five-pointed star pulses with a faint, rhythmic heat. Its lines are jagged and precise, encircling the weathered altar with an unsettling geometry.

properties.name: Giant Boulder
properties.description: A massive, lichen-covered slab of granite that looks like it tumbled from a peak long ago. It sits heavily in the soil, unmoved by the wind or your presence.
properties.takeRefusal: The boulder is far too heavy for any mortal to move, let alone carry.
